name: Sarah's Great Adventure
short_description: In the world of dreams, be a hero who saves the world!
detailed_description:
This is a platform jumping game. You can attack by stepping on enemies and picking them up. You can also pass the level by obtaining skills in the treasure chest! The idea of ​​the game comes from the previous FC game. I wish you a happy game!

[h2]Enemy Introduction[/h2]

1. There are many kinds of enemies, which can be stepped on to pass the level and become bullets!

2. There are many kinds of BOSS, and each BOSS has its own skills!

[h2]Character Introduction[/h2]

1. You can choose multiple skills, each skill has its own characteristics. Using this skill well can reduce the difficulty of your game!

2. Players can eliminate enemies by combining multiple skills to attack!

[h2]Gameplay Introduction[/h2]

1. Obtain skills by picking up treasure chests, and skills will appear randomly to enhance your character!

2. There are many kinds of skills, including auxiliary and attacking abilities!

3. You can pass the level only after all BOSS are eliminated!

supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
